---
title: CHAOSS Weekly Newsletter
author:
  - CHAOSS Community
type: post
date: 2019-07-04T19:36:50+00:00
excerpt: |
  |
    We are excited to announce the two keynotes for CHAOSScon NA in August.
    
    Zaheda Bhorat
    
    @zahedab
    
    Head of Open Source Strategy
    
    Amazon Web Services
    
    and
    
    Jana Gallus
    
    @janagallus
    
    Assistant Professor
    
    UCLA
    
    More information, including titles and the full schedule will follow very shortly.
url: /chaoss-weekly-newsletter/

categories:
  - News
